gpu.name: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3060 Laptop GPU
gpu.note: RTX 3060 LAPTOP GPU with 6 GB VRAM. Qwen3-4B-Q4_K_M (2.32 GiB on disk) is FULLY VRAM-resident: all 36 layers in VRAM, ~4.92 GB peak. Results are specific to this GPU/driver (f32 reduction order is GPU-specific).

build_profile: release, lto=fat, codegen-units=1, target-cpu=x86-64-v3, cuda default-on (Windows)

model.quant_mix: 216 Q4_K tensors (1.765 GB) + 37 Q6_K tensors (0.725 GB) + 145 F32 norms. attn_v / ffn_down / tied token_embd(lm_head) are Q6_K; q/k/o/gate/up are Q4_K. One run exercises BOTH q4k_gemv and q6k_gemv.
model.geometry: explicit head_dim path (head_dim 128 != embedding/head_count), qk_norm; tied output embedding

comparator.flags: /completion: temperature 0, top_k 1, seed 0, cache_prompt false, samplers=[top_k], return_tokens true; server -ngl 0 -ctk f32 -ctv f32 -fa off --no-repack -c 4096
comparator.note: On-disk Windows CPU comparator (CPU-only llama.cpp build on this box; no ggml-cuda.dll). The camelid GPU-resident CUDA decode is compared DIRECTLY against this llama.cpp reference. The GPU==cpu_reference middle leg used for Q8_0 bundles is N/A here: K-quant has no camelid CPU decode path yet (Phase 2), so llama.cpp is the direct reference.

camelid.backend_observed_runtime: cuda_resident kquant engine (q4k_gemv + q6k_gemv), all 36 layers VRAM-resident
camelid.disclosure_gap: The STATIC execution-plan classifier (/api/capabilities) mislabels this lane as selected_backend=cpu_reference / decode_path=safe_cpu_decode / quant_type=dense_or_other ('failing closed to safe path') because it is Q8_0-centric and does not yet recognize Q4_K/Q6_K. The RUNTIME nonetheless ran GPU-resident (proven: 36 layers in VRAM; coherent greedy output; the CPU path errors with data_len=0 when CUDA is hidden because K-quant tensors load wire-only). Recorded as a follow-up labeling fix; NOT a correctness defect (output is token-identical to llama.cpp). See capabilities.json.

prompts: What is the capital of France?
result.claim: GPU-resident CUDA decode of Qwen3-4B-Q4_K_M is token-AND-text-identical to llama.cpp acd79d6 at 1/5/50 generated tokens on all 3 chat prompts (thinking-disabled ChatML, greedy), with cross-engine prompt-token parity.

claim_boundary: Supported exact-row smoke for THIS exact Qwen3-4B-Q4_K_M GGUF (sha 7485fe6f...) on Windows x86_64 (MSVC), GPU CUDA decode on the recorded RTX 3060 Laptop (6 GB) / driver 576.83, fully VRAM-resident, ChatML thinking-DISABLED greedy short-chat. NOT claimed: other Qwen3 sizes/quants, other K-quant files (Q5_K_M, etc.), other GPUs/drivers, long context beyond the resident KV cap, thinking-mode, CPU K-quant decode (does not exist yet), or production throughput.
